title: Post analytics for your content
notes: Used for member post analytics fields: impressions, in-network and out-of-network impressions, members reached, profile viewers, followers gained, reactions, comments, reposts, saves, sends, link visits, demographics, and availability limits.

title: Combined post analytics
notes: Used for portfolio-level analytics, date ranges, exports, impressions, engagements, in-network and out-of-network split, members reached, reactions, comments, reposts, saves, and sends.

title: Differences between a LinkedIn profile and a LinkedIn Page
notes: Used for the distinction between profiles representing individuals and Pages representing organizations.

title: Content analytics for your LinkedIn Page
notes: Used for Page content metrics, including impressions, engagement rate, clicks, reactions, comments, reposts, and the Page definition of engagement rate.

title: Visibility of shared posts
notes: Used for public post visibility, including potential appearance to first-degree connections, second- or third-degree connections after network engagement, topic search results, activity pages, and public profiles.

title: LinkedIn relevance - Optimizing the member experience
notes: Used for LinkedIn's statement that feed systems use profile details, viewed content, and platform interactions to surface relevant posts and reduce weak or unsafe content.

title: 15 Inspiring Content Ideas for Your LinkedIn Page
author: Tequia Burt
notes: Used only for current LinkedIn Page content guidance that not every post should be about the company or product and that point-of-view posts can be useful.

title: 2025 Edelman-LinkedIn B2B Thought Leadership Impact Report
author: Edelman and LinkedIn
notes: Used for B2B buyer context: methodology, sample size, the definition of expertise content in the report, and findings about hidden and target buyers consuming and using expertise content. Not used as proof that founder posts will earn higher engagement.

title: Sell In Public SME Notes for Founder Posts Low Engagement LinkedIn
author: Jeffery Schroeder and Codex
notes: Used for Sell In Public operating guidance and interpretation, framed as POV rather than external research.
